scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/hisohiso-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/hisohiso-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/hisohiso-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/hisohiso-linux-arm64
